stories.title: The AL shuts out the NL to win the All-Star Game! ...
stories.summary: Baseball's best came to play. Relive all the action from the American League's dominant victory over the National League.

stories.title: Cease, 10 AL relievers silence NL in 15-K shutout
stories.summary: Starting pitcher Dylan Cease combined with 10 relievers in a dominant three-hit, 15-strikeout shutout of the National League in a 4-0 win in Tuesday night's All-Star Game.

stories.title: Silver: Kawhi probe must end before season starts
stories.summary: Adam Silver acknowledged that the investigation into Kawhi Leonard for alleged cap circumvention must conclude before the start of next season.

stories.title: AL 3B Caminero hit by pitch, exits in 3rd inning
stories.summary: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game, Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker. Though the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse, X-rays came back negative.

stories.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.
